title: Evangelium
description: A Dimension-Mod for Fabric, that is heavily inspired by the famous Aether-Mod.
body:
![Logo of Evangelium](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7b071a6a948a82fb61a68e2b1fe50a33ae9616e1.png)

## Disclaimer
Versions of this mod that released prior to 2.1.0-mc1.21.11 also change some combat related aspects of the game (e.g. remove the attack cooldown of swords).
Make sure to install the latest version of this mod for your respective minecraft version to avoid these changes.

# Evangelium
**Evangelium is a Dimension-Mod** for Fabric, heavily inspired by the famous **Aether-Mod**. It's main feature is the new new "Heaven-like" Dimension called **"Elysium"**.
You can enter the new Dimension by building a portal. The portal is constructed and activated the same as a Nether-Portal, but instead of Obsidian you use **Silver-Blocks**:

![Elysium Portal](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/622bb7a7c17dc61b08cbadefb621073b09d8fa45.jpeg)

## Biomes
The Elysium-Dimension brings three new biomes with it:
- The Elysium Isles

![The Elysium Isles](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f5870d97d86599b692eda4603eaa4675e1f7d383.jpeg)
- The Weeping Isles

![The Weeping Isles](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ecac0e2e9d5918000e54f55c74c4c51a1cb89fc2.jpeg)
- The Gloaming Valley

![The Gloaming Valley](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1dcdf730330491b262d559f696c27529cda019ce.jpeg)

All of the new biomes have unique vegetation and mobspawns.
These biomes are inhabited by Allays, Vexes, Breezes, Happy Ghasts and many more!
(Some might say if you install an other mod with Weeping Angels, they might spawn as well)

![Happy Ghast](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/83247c009a13dce5d47c50113f17c0ad97756544.jpeg)

## Structures
Throughout your travels in the Elysium, you may enounter a few new structures, such as:
**The Angel Statue and the God Temple**.

![The God Temple](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9b9aa8db714e8b54be88ff76dfe009d4d0c8b34a_0.webp)

Inside these structures chests with unique lootpools and items can be found. But beware! Did you really think it is unprotected?

## Gear and Equipment
Two new sets of Armor and Tools can be obtained in this mod:
**Silver-Gear and Celestial-Gear**.

![Silver Gear](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ffbffef50400bba2dd905f4ae0be1fa118611a03.jpeg)

Silver-Equipment is a little more durable than gold, but can mine as fast as it.
It can be found underground in the Overworld and in the ELysium.
Celestial-Equipment is equivalent to Netherite-Gear and is so to speak the "heavenly counterpart" to the Nethers best Equipment.
it can be found throgh **"Angelic Debris"** in the depths of the Islands in Elysium.

## Decoration and Blocks
This mods a new Wood-Type, called **"Angel Wood"** which can be obtained by (you guesed it) cutting down **Angel Trees**.
There are also a whole lot of stone variants, that can be made of the new **Holy-Stone**. It can be crafted into stairs, slabs, walls, marble and it's variants etc.

![Items(1/2)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8fbd05569aad339a85ec0cc29c79705f85793f65_0.webp)![Items(2/2)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/054b7fa24a36829c7732c537c22651c4feb10753_0.webp)
